cards.title: Installment and split payments
cards.description: Break a purchase into a clear payment schedule while keeping subscription and order records aligned.

cards.title: Early renewal
cards.description: Let customers renew before the due date with safeguards for dates, totals, and duplicate payments.

cards.title: Donation and crowdfunding tools
cards.description: Support recurring contributions and campaign-style funding with flexible customer amounts.

cards.title: Cart Info Editor
cards.description: User-requested controls for hiding first billing cycle, shipping charge, and duration details across cart, checkout, mini cart, and emails.

cards.title: Customer-chosen subscription duration
cards.description: Customers can choose subscription length and billing period, with those choices preserved through renewals and plan changes.

cards.title: Renewal synchronization
cards.description: Align new subscriptions to daily, weekly, monthly, or yearly renewal boundaries with clear first-charge choices.

cards.title: Block-level content restriction
cards.description: Protect Gutenberg blocks and Elementor content with member access controls directly in the editor.
